errors.deferred_date_required: A date is required to defer this ticket
errors.password_too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.requester_cannot_self_approve: The requester may not approve their own purchase request (two-person approval principle).

overview.title: Tickets
overview.reactivated_notice: {count} postponed ticket(s) just became active again.

form.title: New ticket
form.info_banner: Manual creation for tickets that didn't arrive by email. Incoming emails to the configured ticket inbox are automatically turned into tickets (background fetch every 2 minutes).

detail.reply_help_text: Replies are sent by email to the sender (provided the ticket inbox is configured under /admin/settings). Internal notes are never sent.
detail.assignment_help_text: The assignee receives an email notification.
detail.member_multiple_candidates_help: Multiple members use this email address – please choose manually.

login.title: Login – Gartenverein
login.subtitle: Please sign in
login.no_account_notice: No account? An invitation is required.

invitation_expired.title: Invitation expired
invitation_expired.heading: Invitation expired
invitation_expired.message: This invitation link is no longer valid or has already been used.

settings.heading: Club settings
settings.language_help: Applies to the whole installation (all users see the same language). If a translation is missing for a given module, the German text is shown automatically.
settings.module_help: Not every club uses every feature area. Disabled modules disappear from the navigation -- the data is preserved and reappears once re-enabled.
settings.email_help: A single mailbox for everything: system emails (invitations) are sent via SMTP, and the ticket system uses the same mailbox to send replies and additionally polls it via IMAP to capture incoming requests as tickets.
settings.spam_help: Built-in heuristics (sender-domain/keyword blocklist, link count) run immediately with no external service. An external check API is optional and only used if a URL is configured -- an outage of the external API never blocks ticket creation.

modules.work_hours_desc: Work sessions, sponsorships, club roles, and annual report. Disable if the club doesn't collect mandatory work hours.
modules.water_desc: Water meters, readings, and consumption reports. Disable if the club doesn't manage its own water supply.
modules.electricity_desc: Electricity meters, readings, and consumption reports. Disable if the club doesn't manage its own electricity supply.
modules.insurance_desc: Property and accident insurance per parcel, incl. annual report. Disable if the club doesn't handle insurance through the software.
modules.tickets_desc: Support tickets with assignment, status, and member matching. Disable if the club doesn't use an internal ticket system.
modules.purchase_requests_desc: Two-person approval principle for club expenses: submit requests, have them approved or rejected by two board members.
modules.calendar_desc: Community calendar (meetings, inspections, work sessions), member birthdays, and council presence/absence tracking, each with an ICS export. Disable if your association doesn't need these.
modules.public_signup_api_desc: Lets an external website (e.g. a WordPress plugin) submit work-session signups without a Parcella login. Off by default since it opens a public write endpoint; see the Integrations page for the access token.
modules.announcements_desc: Author club news once and prepare it for the blog, member email, and a printable notice.

settings.region_help: Determines number and address format (e.g. thousands separator, order of postal code and city). Independent of the interface language.
settings.currency_help: Determines the symbol and position used for monetary amounts (e.g. "19,99 €" vs. "£19.99"). Selectable independently of language and region.
settings.logo_help: PNG, JPEG, WebP, or SVG, maximum 2 MB. Replaces the tree icon in the sidebar.
settings.logo_remove_label: Remove logo (revert to the default icon)
settings.logo_error_type: Invalid file type. Please upload PNG, JPEG, WebP, or SVG.
settings.logo_error_size: The file is too large (maximum 2 MB).

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.token_regenerated: A new API token has been generated. Update any connected sites with the new value.
integrations.module_disabled_notice: The public signup API is currently disabled, so these endpoints are not reachable.
integrations.public_signup_api_desc: Lets any CMS (WordPress, TYPO3, Contao, or your own site) submit work-session signups through a small connector, without members needing a Parcella login. A reference WordPress plugin is included in the project's integrations folder.
integrations.regenerate_confirm: Regenerating the token immediately breaks any connector still using the old one. Continue?
integrations.regenerate_hint: Regenerating invalidates the current token immediately. Update all connected sites afterwards.
integrations.wordpress_hint: A reference WordPress connector plugin is included in the project's integrations/wordpress folder.
integrations.wordpress_blog_desc: Used by the Announcements module to publish blog drafts. Create an Application Password under your WordPress user profile (Users -> Profile -> Application Passwords) -- don't use your regular WordPress login password here.
integrations.wordpress_app_password_hint: Not your regular WordPress login password -- generate one under your WordPress user profile.

list.title: Members
list.search_placeholder: Search by name or parcel number…
list.csv_multi_help: Separate multiple email addresses / phone numbers with a semicolon.
list.csv_template_tip: Tip: just use a {link} as a template.

detail.danger_zone_text: Marks {name} as deleted. The member disappears from lists and search results, but the data stays in the database -- existing parcel assignments, tickets, work sessions, etc. remain untouched. For a normal end of membership, set "Member until" in the edit form instead of deleting.

list.title: Parcels
list.csv_format_help: Format: semicolon-separated CSV with columns: plot number; area (sqm); status; notes

form.status_help: The time of a status change is automatically logged in the change history -- a separate termination date isn't needed.
form.danger_zone_text: Permanently deletes parcel {plot_number} from the database -- unlike the "Deleted" status, which preserves history. All member assignments for this parcel are removed as well; water connections are kept but without a parcel reference. This action cannot be undone.
form.delete_confirm: Really PERMANENTLY delete parcel {plot_number}? This cannot be undone.

detail.select_member_from_list: Please select a member from the list
detail.delete_history_confirm: Really delete this entry permanently? This cannot be undone.
detail.cannot_delete_active_assignment: An active assignment cannot be deleted -- please end the tenancy first.

configuration.title: Insurance configuration
configuration.heading: Insurance configuration {year}
configuration.base_amount_help: Automatically covers all members who share an address with other residents of the same parcel (the largest shared household).
configuration.additional_amount_help: For parcel members who don't live in the same household and are optionally co-insured.

detail.title: Insurance {plot_number}
detail.heading: Insurance for parcel {plot_number}
detail.auto_covered_intro: Automatically covered (share an address with other residents):
detail.external_intro: Other parcel members (different address) -- can optionally be co-insured for an extra charge:

form.title: New purchase request
form.label_link: Link to where it can be purchased
form.on_behalf_label: Create on behalf of another person (who has no account of their own)
form.person_email_help: The person will receive a link to confirm the details.

detail.requester_cannot_approve: As the requester, you cannot approve your own purchase request (two-person approval principle).

confirm.title: Confirm purchase request
confirm.heading: Confirm purchase request
confirm.intro: The following purchase request was entered on your behalf. Please review the details and confirm if everything is correct.
confirm.already_confirmed: You have already confirmed these details.

confirmed.title: Confirmed
confirmed.heading: Thank you!
confirmed.message: Your confirmation for "{title}" has been saved.

confirmation_invalid.title: Invalid link
confirmation_invalid.heading: Link not found
confirmation_invalid.message: This confirmation link is invalid or has already been used.

overview.open_readings_notice: {count} metering point(s) still have no reading for {year}.

point_form.label_placeholder: e.g. clubhouse, wash station, main meter {medium}

point_detail.exchange_confirm: Really exchange the meter? The old meter will be deactivated.
point_detail.no_active_meter: No active meter for this metering point.

errors.overall_plausibility_overview: The sum of parcel ({parcels} {unit}) and club consumption ({club} {unit}) exceeds the main meter consumption ({main} {unit}) for {year}. Please check the meter readings.
errors.overall_plausibility_evaluation: Distributed consumption ({total} {unit}) exceeds main meter consumption ({main} {unit}).
errors.reading_below_previous: The meter reading ({new_value}) must not be smaller than the previous reading ({previous_value}) of the same meter.
errors.reading_above_later: The meter reading ({new_value}) must not be larger than the already-recorded later reading ({later_value}) of the same meter.
errors.no_active_meter: No active meter for this metering point

club_roles.title: Club Roles
club_roles.delete_confirm: Really delete this role? All assignments will be lost.
club_roles.none_for_year: No members in club roles for {year}.

configuration.title: Mandatory Hours Configuration
configuration.mode_hint_parcel_text: All tenants of a parcel jointly complete the mandatory hours.
configuration.mode_hint_member_text: Each member completes their hours individually.
configuration.note_placeholder: e.g. Resolution of the AGM on 15 March 2025

evaluation.title: Mandatory Hours Evaluation {year}
evaluation.no_data: No data available – have parcels and members been created?

member_club_role_form.title: Edit Assignment
member_club_role_form.year_hint: The mandatory-hours exemption applies for this entire calendar year.
member_club_role_form.note_placeholder: e.g. reason for stepping down, handover to…

session_detail.delete_confirm: Really delete session "{title}"? All participations will be lost.
session_detail.no_tasks: No tasks scheduled for this session yet.

session_form.title_placeholder: e.g. Spring Cleanup, Hedge Trimming North Side
session_form.hours_per_participant_hint: Can be adjusted individually when logging attendance

sponsorships.title: Sponsorships {year}
sponsorships.area_placeholder: e.g. North Hedge, Playground, Entrance Area
sponsorships.area_hint: Select an existing area to add another member to it – multiple people can share one area.
sponsorships.description_placeholder: What exactly is being maintained / cared for?
sponsorships.credited_hours_hint_prefilled: Pre-filled with the current mandatory-hours configuration for {year} ({hours}h) – adjustable as needed.
sponsorships.credited_hours_hint_missing: No mandatory-hours configuration for {year} on file.

errors.configuration_year_exists: A different configuration already exists for {year}.
errors.task_not_scheduled: This task isn't scheduled to a session yet
errors.participant_not_in_session: This participant isn't signed up for this session

tasks.title: Tasks
tasks.title_placeholder: e.g. Trim the north hedge, fix the gate latch
tasks.description_placeholder: Any details worth knowing before starting...
tasks.workload_help: A rough guide for whoever assigns this task to a participant -- not enforced by the system.
tasks.session_help: Leave as backlog to schedule it later.
tasks.assign_hint: Assign each task to one of this session's signed-up participants above.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.total_area_footer: Sum of all active parcel areas

hub.title: Calendar
hub.community_desc: Member meetings, parcel inspections, and work sessions.
hub.council_presence_desc: When council members will be on-site.
hub.council_absence_desc: Log your own absence (e.g. vacation) so others know you're away.
hub.ics_public_label: Public ICS link (safe to embed on your public website):
hub.ics_private_label: Private ICS link (keep this to yourself -- anyone with this link can view it):

community.title: Community Calendar
community.end_date_help: Only for multi-day entries -- leave empty for a single day.

council_presence.title: Council Presence
council_presence.note_placeholder: e.g. Open office hours for members

council_absence.title: Council Absence
council_absence.new_card_help: Anyone with a system account can log their own absence here.

errors.not_your_entry: You can only delete your own entries

form.title: Announcement
form.error_missing_fields: Please provide both a title and a body text.
form.error_invalid_image_type: Please upload a PNG, JPEG, or WebP image.
form.error_image_too_large: The image is too large (maximum 5 MB).
form.image_hint: PNG, JPEG, or WebP, up to 5 MB. Used as the blog's featured image and shown in the email.
form.body_hint: Written in Markdown. This same text is used for both the blog draft and the member email.
form.print_override_hint: Leave empty to print the full text above. If it doesn't fit on one page, a shortened version will be suggested here -- feel free to edit it.
form.print_too_long: Likely too long for one printed page -- consider shortening.
form.send_email_confirm: Send this announcement by email to all current members with email notifications enabled?
form.save_does_not_send_hint: Saving only stores your changes -- it doesn't send or publish anything. Use the buttons below once you're ready.
form.test_email_hint: Sends the current content to one address for review. Never counted as a real send and never goes to members.
form.test_email_failed: Could not send the test email -- check the SMTP configuration under Admin -> Settings.
form.sending_refresh_hint: In progress -- reload this page to see the latest count.
